chief_complaint: Chronic lower back pain with occasional radiating ache into the left hip, aggravated by prolonged sitting.
aggravating_factors: Sitting at a desk for more than 45 minutes, cold and damp weather, stress.
relieving_factors: Heat pad, gentle stretching, lying on a firm surface.
diet_description: Mostly home-cooked meals, tendency to skip lunch when busy.
treatment_goals: Reduce daily pain so I can sit at my desk for a full workday without discomfort. Improve core strength.

chief_complaint: Chronic insomnia — difficulty falling asleep and frequent waking between 1–3 am. Feeling unrested despite 7 hours in bed.
aggravating_factors: Work deadlines, caffeine after noon, screen time before bed.
relieving_factors: Melatonin (mild relief only), reading before bed.
diet_description: Skips breakfast, heavy dinner, drinks 3–4 coffees daily.
treatment_goals: Fall asleep within 20 minutes and sleep through the night. Wake feeling rested.

chief_complaint: Generalised anxiety, chest tightness, and frequent shallow breathing. Difficulty managing work-related stress.
aggravating_factors: High-pressure work environments, deadlines, social gatherings.
relieving_factors: Yoga, deep breathing, spending time in nature.
diet_description: Healthy but tends to under-eat when anxious. Occasional comfort eating.
treatment_goals: Reduce baseline anxiety and manage stress without medication. Improve overall sense of calm.

chief_complaint: Recurring migraines, typically right-sided, with visual aura, nausea, and photophobia. Episodes 2–3 times per month.
aggravating_factors: Stress, poor sleep, skipping meals, bright lights, strong smells.
relieving_factors: Dark quiet room, ice pack, sumatriptan (prescribed).
diet_description: Irregular meal times; tends to skip meals during busy periods.
treatment_goals: Reduce migraine frequency from 2–3 per month to less than 1. Decrease severity and duration.

chief_complaint: Seeking fertility support. Irregular menstrual cycles (35–42 days), mild cramping, and low energy in the luteal phase.
diet_description: Balanced vegetarian diet. Avoids processed food. Drinks warm water throughout the day.
treatment_goals: Regulate menstrual cycle, support ovarian function, and prepare body for natural conception.

chief_complaint: Chronic bloating, loose stools, and post-meal fatigue. IBS diagnosis 8 years ago. Symptoms worse after stress or rich foods.
aggravating_factors: Fatty or spicy foods, alcohol, emotional stress, cold drinks.
relieving_factors: Simple bland diet, warmth, rest after meals.
diet_description: Mostly home-cooked. Avoids known triggers but still experiences flare-ups. Low-fibre diet.
treatment_goals: Reduce bloating frequency and improve energy after meals. Achieve more consistent bowel movements.

chief_complaint: Chronic right-side shoulder and upper trapezius tension. Stiffness in the morning and after long work sessions.
aggravating_factors: Prolonged laptop use, cold drafts, poor posture.
diet_description: Varied and generally healthy. Tends to eat late dinners due to work schedule.
treatment_goals: Eliminate morning stiffness and reduce shoulder tension to allow comfortable all-day work.

chief_complaint: Peri-menopausal hot flushes (6–8 per day), night sweats, irritability, and brain fog. Some vaginal dryness.
aggravating_factors: Stress, spicy foods, alcohol, warm environments.
relieving_factors: Cool environments, loose cotton clothing, mindfulness practice.
diet_description: Varied diet. Reduces sugar and processed foods. Drinks herbal teas.
treatment_goals: Reduce hot flush frequency and night sweats. Improve sleep quality and stabilise mood.

chief_complaint: Chronic neck and upper back tension from prolonged screen time. Morning stiffness and occasional headaches.
aggravating_factors: Sitting at desk, stress, cold weather, poor ergonomics.
relieving_factors: Stretching, massage, heat therapy, neck exercises.
diet_description: Healthy with occasional takeout. Drinks lots of coffee.
treatment_goals: Reduce daily neck tension, eliminate morning stiffness, prevent tension headaches.

chief_complaint: Post-race muscle soreness and tight hip flexors. Looking for recovery massage to improve performance and prevent injuries.
aggravating_factors: Running, prolonged sitting after training, lack of recovery time.
relieving_factors: Massage, stretching, foam rolling, ice baths.
diet_description: High-protein diet for athletic recovery. Plenty of hydration.
treatment_goals: Maintain muscle health, improve recovery time, prevent running injuries.

chief_complaint: Persistent lower back pain following car accident 8 months ago. Radiating pain into left leg. Work capacity limited.
aggravating_factors: Bending, lifting, prolonged standing, sitting longer than 30 minutes.
relieving_factors: Rest, ice packs, ibuprofen, lying flat.
diet_description: Tends to eat fast food due to work schedule. Inconsistent eating patterns.
treatment_goals: Reduce lower back and leg pain to return to full-duty work. Improve sleep quality.

chief_complaint: Chronic tension headaches occurring 4-5 times per week. Migraine aura occasionally. Limited by frequent analgesic use.
aggravating_factors: Work stress, poor posture, skipping meals, hormonal cycles.
relieving_factors: Rest in dark room, ice packs, neck stretching.
diet_description: Skips breakfast often. Drinks 3-4 coffees daily. Late dinners.
treatment_goals: Reduce headache frequency and intensity. Improve overall neck mobility. Reduce medication dependency.

chief_complaint: Post-operative rehabilitation following ACL reconstruction surgery 3 months ago. Limited knee flexion and functional mobility.
aggravating_factors: Excessive bending, stairs, running, prolonged standing.
relieving_factors: Ice, elevation, prescribed exercises, light walking.
diet_description: High-protein diet to support healing. Good hydration.
treatment_goals: Restore full knee range of motion. Return to walking and light activities. Build strength and confidence.

chief_complaint: Lower back strain from repetitive lifting at work. Difficulty with functional activities like bending and twisting.
relieving_factors: Rest, heat therapy, gentle stretching, pain relief medications.
diet_description: Tries to eat healthy but shift work makes it difficult. Occasionally skips meals.
treatment_goals: Return to full work duties without pain. Improve core strength. Learn proper body mechanics.
